name: My Little Pony RPG
description:
An RPG bot based on My Little Pony. It features all the important characters, most locations, all possible creatures and races, and the backstory of the world.

My bot is set at the beginning of season 6 of the original MLP. But I can change this if the majority wants me to.

---
Notes:
Use Deepseek or Gemini as a Proxy, otherwise it will not work as it should. English is NOT the author's native language, do not even point out any errors in the text. The author also condemns and does not support everything that needs to be condemned and does not support, he did not want to offend anyone, he does not claim authorship, please do not hit me.

---
